member.name: P:FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.RobotsTxt.Constants.License
member.summary: The plain text of the license. Used for the web page and embedding the license into the robots.txt file annotations.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.RobotsTxt.Constants.LicenseUrl
member.summary: The Url of the license for the robots.txt file.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.RobotsTxt.Constants.GetLicense
member.summary: Returns the license text from the embedded resource ensuring the reader is explicitly disposed of.

member.name: T:FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.RobotsTxt.Data.IRobotsTxtData
member.summary: Output data structures for the provide crawler usages.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.RobotsTxt.Data.IRobotsTxtData.PlainText
member.summary: A complete text block ready to write to a file robots.txt.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.RobotsTxt.Data.IRobotsTxtData.AnnotatedText
member.summary: A complete annotated text block ready to write to a file robots.txt.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.RobotsTxt.Data.RobotsTxtData.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.RobotsTxt.Data.RobotsTxtData},FiftyOne.Pipeline.Core.FlowElements.IPipeline,FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.RobotsTxt.FlowElements.RobotsTxtEngine)
member.summary: Constructs a new instance of .
member.param: The pipeline this data belongs to.
The engine that created this data.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.RobotsTxt.Data.RobotsTxtData.PlainText
member.summary: See

member.name: P:FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.RobotsTxt.Data.RobotsTxtData.AnnotatedText
member.summary: See

member.name: T:FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.RobotsTxt.FlowElements.RobotsTxtEngineBuilder
member.summary: Builder for .

member.name: M:FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.RobotsTxt.FlowElements.RobotsTxtEngineBuilder.Build
member.summary: Build the engine without a data file. PropertyKeyedDeviceEngine does not use a DataFile directly — it resolves its data from DeviceDetectionHashEngine via AddPipeline at runtime.

member.name: F:FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.RobotsTxt.FlowElements.RobotsTxtEngine.AllowValues
member.summary: Evidence key values that indicate the crawler usage is allowed.

member.name: F:FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.RobotsTxt.FlowElements.RobotsTxtEngine.DisallowValues
member.summary: Evidence key values that indicate the crawler usage is not allowed.

member.name: F:FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.RobotsTxt.FlowElements.RobotsTxtEngine.ValidValues
member.summary: Evidence key values that are valid.

member.name: F:FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.RobotsTxt.FlowElements.RobotsTxtEngine._generatorService
member.summary: The robots.txt generator service.

member.name: F:FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.RobotsTxt.FlowElements.RobotsTxtEngine._queryService
member.summary: The service that converts a into a data set that can then be used to create the model.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.RobotsTxt.FlowElements.RobotsTxtEngine.Properties
member.summary: Properties available for robots.txt.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.RobotsTxt.FlowElements.RobotsTxtEngine.Process(FiftyOne.Pipeline.Core.Data.IFlowData)
member.summary: Only processes if there are evidence keys for this engine available.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.RobotsTxt.FlowElements.RobotsTxtEngine.ProcessEngine(FiftyOne.Pipeline.Core.Data.IFlowData,FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.RobotsTxt.Data.IRobotsTxtData)
member.summary: Get the allowed usages.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.RobotsTxt.FlowElements.RobotsTxtEngine.AddPipeline(FiftyOne.Pipeline.Core.FlowElements.IPipeline)
member.summary: Adds the pipeline to build the data set. Then works out all the possible evidence keys that can be used by the engine, and the robots.txt model that will be used with the generator service.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.RobotsTxt.FlowElements.RobotsTxtEngine.GetEvidenceKeys(FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.RobotsTxt.Model.UsageModel[])
member.summary: Enumerates the various crawler usage values that can be provided as evidence.

member.name: T:FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.RobotsTxt.Messages
member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.RobotsTxt.Messages.ResourceManager
member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.RobotsTxt.Messages.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.RobotsTxt.Messages.AnnotatedTextDescription
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to A version of the robots.txt not intended for production use that contains comments explaining how each crawler is being treated and URLs to find out more information..

member.name: P:FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.RobotsTxt.Messages.MissingRobotsTxtEvidence
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Value '{0}' is not valid for crawler usage with robots.txt..

member.name: P:FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.RobotsTxt.Messages.PlainTextDescription
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to A simple version of the robots.txt lines with minimal comments..

member.name: T:FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.RobotsTxt.Model.CrawlerModel
member.summary: Details associated with each crawler. Used both for extraction and then refinement.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.RobotsTxt.Model.CrawlerModel.Name
member.summary: The name of the crawler. Relates to the CrawlerName property.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.RobotsTxt.Model.CrawlerModel.Usages
member.summary: Array of usage names that must be available in that this crawler is associated with. Used to work out how to treat the User-Agent in the robots.txt file.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.RobotsTxt.Model.CrawlerModel.ProductTokens
member.summary: Product tokens.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.RobotsTxt.Model.CrawlerModel.ReferenceUris
member.summary: Reference URIs.

member.name: T:FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.RobotsTxt.Model.RobotsTxtModel
member.summary: A model for all the data needed to work with Robots.Txt. Provided in JSON format from a transformation of Daphne data.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.RobotsTxt.Model.RobotsTxtModel.Crawlers
member.summary: A list of the crawlers that are available.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.RobotsTxt.Model.RobotsTxtModel.Usages
member.summary: A list of the possible usages in the order which they should be shown in UIs and reports.

member.name: T:FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.RobotsTxt.Model.UsageModel
member.summary: Data used to describe the crawler usage for the user interface.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.RobotsTxt.Model.UsageModel.Name
member.summary: The unique name of the usage. i.e. Search, Monitoring, LLM

member.name: P:FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.RobotsTxt.Model.UsageModel.Description
member.summary: The description for the usage.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.RobotsTxt.Model.UsageModel.Default
member.summary: Whether the usage should default to enabled or disabled.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.RobotsTxt.Model.UsageModel.Order
member.summary: The order that the usage category should appear in relative to others.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.RobotsTxt.Services.GeneratorService.Write(System.IO.TextWriter,System.Collections.Generic.HashSet{System.String},System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Builds a robots.txt with or without annotations for the choices provided.
member.param: Text writer to send the robots.txt content to.
Usages that are allowed in the robots.txt. All other usages will be disallowed.
True if the resulting file should include annotations, otherwise false.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.RobotsTxt.Services.GeneratorService.AddCopyright(System.IO.TextWriter)
member.summary: Adds a simple copyright and license line at the top of the file. Needed to avoid competitors taking the data and using it in their products.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.RobotsTxt.Services.GeneratorService.AddHeader(System.IO.TextWriter)
member.summary: Adds the header for the text with annotations to explain what the different entries mean.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.RobotsTxt.Services.GeneratorService.GetIsAllowed(FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.RobotsTxt.Model.CrawlerModel,System.Collections.Generic.HashSet{System.String})
member.summary: True if the crawler supports at least one of the usages.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.RobotsTxt.Services.GeneratorService.GetNotAllowed(FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.RobotsTxt.Model.CrawlerModel,System.Collections.Generic.HashSet{System.String})
member.summary: Returns any usages for the crawler that the allowed choices prohibit.
